posts.text: The environmental stakes are high. Oil slicks threaten sea life, including the strait’s important coral reefs. The human costs in the event of a major spill would be higher still https://www.economist.com/middle-east-and-africa/2026/05/28/the-gulf-war-makes-devastating-oil-spills-more-likely?taid=6a1c01f9d6c718000177b852&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter
posts.author: TheEconomist

posts.text:
Consider the fractal nature of the human lungs.   Then consider how we will soon innovate new products by nano engineering, 3d printing, while using novel nano-materials.  

We are on the cusp of making monumental gains in efficiency and the core technology is turbostratic fractal graphene.  It’s the structural scaffolding of our future nano tech world
posts.author: BambroughKevin
